home.title: Au Fil des Saveurs
home.heroProse: Spéculoos baked slowly, shortbreads with fresh Belgian butter, macarons with hazelnuts from Piedmont. Everything is made in Liège, in small quantities, to preserve the taste.
home.featuredTitle: The biscuits we bake again and again
home.storyProse: Au Fil des Saveurs was born from an obsession: turning the Belgian biscuit into a tasting experience, not an industrial product. In our workshop on Rue de la Maison in Liège, every batch comes out golden by hand, watched to the minute.
home.coffretsProse: Choose your favourite biscuits and we'll assemble a box for you in recyclable beeswax packaging. Available spring 2026.
home.instagramEyebrow: LIFE AT AU FIL DES SAVEURS
home.newsletterDisclaimer: No spam, just monthly updates. Unsubscribe in 1 click.
home.storyPullQuote: Every biscuit tells the gesture of a hand that takes its time.
home.coffretsListSubtitle: Four signature compositions, ready to be offered.

histoire.title: A Liège biscuit house
histoire.lead: Au Fil des Saveurs was born in 2026 from a very simple obsession: to feel, in every bite, the gesture of a hand that takes its time. No assembly line, no industrial press — only dough, oven, and a great deal of patience.
histoire.section1Body: On Rue de la Maison, in Liège, in an eighty-square-meter workshop, we bake each batch by the minute. We watch the baking — not with a timer, but with our eyes. When the shortbread edge browns just right, the tray comes out.
histoire.section1Quote: The gesture makes the flavour, not the recipe.
histoire.section2Body: Fresh Belgian butter, organic Walloon flour, unrefined cane sugar, Madagascar vanilla. One rule: if we wouldn't buy it for ourselves, it doesn't go in the dough.
histoire.section2Quote: Fewer than five ingredients per recipe, always.
histoire.section3Body: We believe luxury is time. Time to knead gently. Time to let rest. Time to slip a handwritten note into every gift box. That is the time we share with every biscuit.
histoire.section3Quote: Luxury is the time we take.
histoire.signature: — The Au Fil des Saveurs House
histoire.ctaSubtitle: Thirty recipes, slowly baked in Liège.

footer.tagline: Belgian artisan biscuits, baked with love in Liège.
footer.bio: A small Liège house that bakes slowly, watches every minute, and slips a handwritten note into every gift box. Open since 2026.
footer.copyright: © {year} Au Fil des Saveurs — All rights reserved
